text: In IGF Code, Secondary protection means

options.text: the liquid-resisting outer element of a fuel containment system designed to afford temporary containment of any envisaged leakage of liquid fuel through the primary protection
a failure of the first barrier will not lead to a hazard because of the secondary protection
a failure of the first barrier will lead to a hazard because of the primary protection
the liquid-resisting outer element of a fuel containment system designed to afford temporary containment of any envisaged leakage of liquid fuel through the secondary protection
